hero.title: All Restaurants,
hero.subtitle: Discover, explore, and reserve tables at the finest restaurants — all in seconds.
how.title: How It Works
how.description: Reserve your perfect table in three easy steps.
steps.search.title: Search
steps.search.description: Browse hundreds of restaurants by cuisine, location, price range, or occasion.
steps.book.title: Book
steps.book.description: Pick your date, time, and party size. Reserve instantly — no waiting, no calls.
steps.dine.title: Dine
steps.dine.description: Show up and enjoy. Your table will be ready and waiting just for you.
featured.title: Featured Restaurants
featured.description: From cozy bistros to fine dining — find your next favourite spot.
testimonials.title: Loved by Food Enthusiasts
testimonial1.quote: ReserveHub made our anniversary dinner absolutely seamless. Found a rooftop restaurant in 2 minutes and booked instantly. Incredible!
testimonial2.quote: I used to spend 20 mins calling restaurants. Now I book in seconds. ReserveHub is the app I never knew I needed until now.
testimonial3.quote: The filter by occasion feature is a game-changer. Found the perfect spot for my parents' birthday with just a few clicks!
cta.title: Ready to Reserve Your Next Table?
cta.description: Join over 50,000 happy diners who book with ReserveHub every month.
